meaning: n.鍙嶆敾,鍙嶈瘔vt.鍙嶅嚮,鍙嶈瘔,鍙嶅憡
examples: Countercharge system has its usefulness in practice and profound procedural meaning in theory as well.
The countercharge, an important system in the civil action, is a basic litigious right the defendant has.
Countercharge is not only an important system of civil litigation, but an important theoretic issue of that also.
